title: Invalid file type while trying to upload zipped production build
excerpt: I’m following tutorial https://monday.com/developers/apps/quickstart-view, but receive error on the screenshot while trying to upload zipped production build.

posts.author: volodymyr.havryliuk (Volodymyr Havryliuk)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m following tutorial https://monday.com/developers/apps/quickstart-view, but receive error on the screenshot while trying to upload zipped production build.

posts.author: vcdizon04 (Vincent Dizon)
posts.cookedHtml: Me too, I’m encountering this issue. I just followed the quickstart.

posts.author: Talh-monday.com (Tal Haramati)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey! We believe we’ve fixed this, can you please try again?

posts.author: volodymyr.havryliuk (Volodymyr Havryliuk)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, it works now! Thank you very much!
